  "reason": "Pivoting from template pack to prompt pack for AI-Powered Social Media Content, as this is a more direct application of AI capabilities for content generation.",

    "title": "Outline AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack",
    "details": "Structure the content for a prompt pack designed to generate social media posts using AI. This should include sections for different post types (e.g., engagement, promotion, educational), tone variations, and platform optimizations.",

  "productTitle": "AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack",
  "productType": "prompt pack",
  "niche": "AI Content Generation",
  "targetBuyer": "Social Media Managers & Content Creators",
  "listingTitle": "AI Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack | Effortless Content Creation",
  "shortDescription": "Unlock effortless social media content creation with our AI prompt pack. Generate engaging posts in minutes for any platform.",
  "priceSuggestion": "competitive",
  "price": 19.99,
  "description": "Struggling to consistently create engaging social media content? This AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack is your solution. Designed for social media managers and content creators, this pack provides a curated collection of effective prompts to harness the power of AI for generating high-quality posts across various platforms.     "Experiment with various tones and styles (humorous, professional, informative)",
    "Overcome writer's block with ready-to-use, effective AI prompts",
    "Save hours on content ideation and drafting",
    "Ideal for social medi

parsedObject.reason: Pivoting from template pack to prompt pack for AI-Powered Social Media Content, as this is a more direct application of AI capabilities for content generation.

task.title: Outline AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack
task.details: Structure the content for a prompt pack designed to generate social media posts using AI. This should include sections for different post types (e.g., engagement, promotion, educational), tone variations, and platform optimizations.

parsedObject.productTitle: AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack
parsedObject.listingTitle: AI Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack | Effortless Content Creation
parsedObject.shortDescription: Unlock effortless social media content creation with our AI prompt pack. Generate engaging posts in minutes for any platform.
parsedObject.description: Struggling to consistently create engaging social media content? This AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack is your solution. Designed for social media managers and content creators, this pack provides a curated collection of effective prompts to harness the power of AI for generating high-quality posts across various platforms. Save time, overcome writer's block, and boost your social media presence with AI-driven creativity.
bullets: Generate diverse post types (engagement, promotional, educational, etc.)
Adapt prompts for different social media platforms (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn)
Experiment with various tones and styles (humorous, professional, informative)
Overcome writer's block with ready-to-use, effective AI prompts
Save hours on content ideation and drafting
Ideal for social media managers, freelancers, and small businesses
parsedObject.publishInstructions: To publish, create a PDF document containing the structured prompts. Ensure clear headings for each prompt category and type. Add a brief introduction explaining how to use the prompts effectively with popular AI models.
